response.justification: Currently a Staff Software Engineer doing fullstack work in the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with explicit AI-agent infrastructure experience; 20 years of consistent senior/staff-level development far exceeds the 6-year requirement, with demonstrated mastery in testing practices and system architecture.
strengths: Current role directly matches primary stack and includes AI-agent infrastructure work
20+ years of progressive senior/staff-level fullstack experience across diverse domains and industries
Deep testing culture background: TDD advocate, created training courses, strong framework expertise
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in experience (though extensive Node.js backend work indicated)
Vitest and Playwright not called out by name (though general testing expertise is demonstrably strong)
Significant breadth across many languages and technologies—though all senior roles suggest mastery

key_factors.factor: Current role matches primary stack exactly
20+ years senior/staff experience far exceeds requirement
Specific framework names (Nest.js, Vitest) not mentioned
